rows.notes: Consensus between gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Clear page title with no associated amounts.

rows.description: Dr. Shortridge's Benef: half a year to Midr.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description is more accurate to the main ledger text; claude-haiku misread 'Dr. Shortridge' as 'Sr Partridge' and expanded 'Midr.' to 'Midsummer', also including a marginal note '1774' that is not part of the main entry description.

Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of '08 0 0' as 8 pounds. The '08' is clearly in the pounds column. claude-haiku incorrectly read '08' as 8 shillings. Description updated to include apostrophe based on image.
Consensus between gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku. Clear entry and amounts.

rows.description: Mids. & Xmas Div. in stock, 3 pr: cent: consol:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description '3 pr: cent: consol:' is more accurate to the image than claude-haiku's '3d Rat: consol:'.
Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description 'Bursar' is visually confirmed as more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Barrator'.

rows.description: Took out of the Chest for L. Wittenham Div:
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description 'Chest' is visually confirmed as more accurate than claude-haiku's 'Plate'.
Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description is visually confirmed as accurate; claude-haiku's 'Terrier for Occ:' is incorrect.

rows.description: Dr. Shortridge's Benef: half a year to Xmas
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description 'Dr. Shortridge's' is visually confirmed as accurate; claude-haiku's 'Sr Partridge's' is incorrect.
Extracted from gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a header row. claude-haiku missed this row.

rows.description: Mr. Oswald Jackson's Acct for the Merton estate for the year from Mic: 1773 to Mic: 1774
rows.notes: Extracted from gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku had significant errors in description (e.g. 'dett' for 'Acct', 'Vicarage' for 'Merton', 'Mids:' for 'Mic:'). Visually confirmed.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of 205 pounds. claude-haiku misread the '0' as a '6'.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Corn Rent' (claude-haiku correct on text, gpt-5-mini was uncertain and misread 'C' as 'G'). Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's amount of 7 pounds (claude-haiku misread '7' as '9'). Shillings and pence are in consensus.
Amounts and row_type are in consensus. gpt-5-mini correctly transcribed the numerical description (corrected dashes to spaces based on image), while claude-haiku provided a generic placeholder.
Amounts and row_type are in consensus. gpt-5-mini's description is visually confirmed as 'Allowed Land Tax'; claude-haiku's 'Allotmd Land Tax' is inaccurate.

Visual verification confirms pounds as 16 (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku incorrect). Shillings and pence whole are in consensus. Visual verification confirms a 'q' (farthing) symbol after pence, so 0.25 fraction (claude-haiku correct, gpt-5-mini missed it). Description 'closes' is correct.

Pounds, shillings, pence whole, and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms the description 'Deduct' (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku has 'Deducted'). Visual verification confirms a 'q' (farthing) symbol after pence, so 0.25 fraction (claude-haiku correct, gpt-5-mini missed it).

Pounds, shillings, pence whole, and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms description 'July 22d — Recd Balance' (combining best parts). Visual verification confirms a half-penny symbol ('d' with tail and rightmost repetition '½'), so 0.5 fraction (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku incorrectly identified it as 0.25).
Amounts, fraction, and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms description 'Bursar' (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku has 'Barrator').

rows.description: Took out of the College Chest
rows.notes: Amounts and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms description 'Chest' (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku has 'Glebe').

rows.description: House Fees from Mr. Sarrande, Dean
rows.notes: Amounts and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms description 'Mr. Sarrande, Dean' (gpt-5-mini was close with 'Savande', claude-haiku's 'Terrance' is incorrect).

Pounds, shillings, pence whole, and row_type are in consensus. Visual verification confirms the numerical description and a clear '3/4' symbol after pence, so 0.75 fraction (gpt-5-mini correct, claude-haiku incorrectly identified it as 0.25).

rows.description: Recepta pro hoc anno & pro debitis anni præcedentis
rows.notes: Extracted from gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms this is a single 'total' entry with a descriptive Latin text and associated amounts, linked by a brace. claude-haiku incorrectly split this into a header (without amounts) and a separate total row (with a placeholder description) which is an interpretation error leading to an extra row.
